details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest 60-min evening energy coaching next Wednesday
Task 2: Add three meditation audios under $15 (rating ≥4.5, 10–30 min) to cart
Task 3: Enroll in beginner chakra-balancing course starting next month (≤6 weeks, ≤$150, ≥4 Q&A)
Task 4: Create weekly self-care schedule with 5 events (3 morning meditations, 2 evening reflections)
Task 5: Bookmark up to four short grounding technique articles from last 12 months
Task 6: Complete Spiritual Alignment Coaching intake questionnaire
Task 7: Compare two energy healing coaches and book intro with better-rated coach under $120
Task 8: Choose membership plan under $40/month with ≥2 live group sessions and start monthly membership
Task 9: Create 6-step "New Moon Intention Practice" ritual with ≥2 morning and ≥2 evening steps, reorder Candle meditation, save
